input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.6.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.6.4
            TITLE: any conductors (wires, busbars, etc) conducting the entire pack current must meet one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.6.4: Any conductors (wires, busbars, etc) conducting the entire pack current must meet one of:
EV.6.6.4 Any conductors (wires, busbars, etc) conducting the entire pack current must meet one of: 
a. Be appropriately sized for the total current that the individual Overcurrent Protection 
devices could transmit
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 100 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
b. Contain additional Overcurrent Protection to protect the conductors

final_answer: Any conductors (wires, busbars, etc) conducting the entire pack current must meet one of: a. Be appropriately sized for the total current that the individual Overcurrent Protection devices could transmit b. Contain additional Overcurrent Protection to protect the conductors
